tools.name: outlook_sender_digest
tools.description: Scan Outlook inbox and group messages by sender to identify high-volume senders (e.g. newsletters). Returns top senders sorted by message count with metadata for bulk cleanup.

query.description: Optional search query to narrow results. If omitted, scans all inbox messages from the last 90 days.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Microsoft accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_outreach_scan
tools.description: Scan Outlook inbox for senders without List-Unsubscribe headers (potential cold outreach). Returns top senders with message counts and sample subjects. Read-only - use outlook_archive and outlook_mail_rules for cleanup.

time_range.description: Time range filter (default '90d'). Accepts values like '30d', '7d', '90d'.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Microsoft accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email in Outlook. The draft will appear in Outlook Drafts for user review. Use in_reply_to with an Outlook message ID to create a reply draft.

in_reply_to.description: Outlook message ID to reply to. Creates a reply draft that preserves the conversation thread.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_send_draft
tools.description: Send an existing Outlook draft. Only use when the user has reviewed and explicitly approved sending.

draft_id.description: Outlook draft message ID to send

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_forward
tools.description: Create a draft forwarding an Outlook message to another recipient, preserving attachments. Microsoft Graph handles attachment forwarding natively.

comment.description: Optional text to include with the forwarded message

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_trash
tools.description: Move an Outlook message to Deleted Items. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message_id.description: Outlook message ID to move to Deleted Items

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_categories
tools.description: Add, remove, or list available categories on Outlook messages. Include a confidence score (0-1) for add/remove actions.

categories.description: Category names to add or remove

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_follow_up
tools.description: Track, list, untrack, or complete follow-up flags on Outlook messages using the native flag system. Include a confidence score (0-1) for track/complete/untrack actions.

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_unsubscribe
tools.description: Unsubscribe from a mailing list by following the List-Unsubscribe header on an Outlook message. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message_id.description: An Outlook message ID from the mailing list to unsubscribe from

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: outlook_attachments
tools.description: List or download Outlook email attachments. Use action 'list' to enumerate attachments on a message, then 'download' to save a specific attachment to disk.

action.description: List attachments on a message, or download a specific attachment

attachment_id.description: Attachment ID (required for download, from a prior list call)

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
